caption: A man wearing a grey wig, glasses, headphones, and a white shirt with a red bow tie and suspenders is speaking into a microphone. He is positioned in a room with several framed photographs on the wall behind him. To his right, another person wearing a black shirt and a baseball cap is partially visible and appears to be moving or reaching for something. A professional microphone is positioned in front of the man, and equipment is visible to the right. On-screen text includes a logo that reads "PODCAST" and "GOSS TALK JOY". Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expressions and mouth movements shift as he continues to speak. The overall scene is a static indoor studio setting where the primary action is the man talking.
